DOMTextRun.characters: For help installing these components, read the documentation at https://github.com/PsychoGoldfishNG/NewgroundsIO-AS3
Copy and paste this to the start of your game. Be sure and fill out the 'Component Parameters' in the properties tab with your App details.
Copy and paste this to easily import the medal sound effects. (once you've imported this to your library, you can remove it from the timeline)
Copy and paste this to a layer that covers all frames where medals could be unlocked. If you have muliple scenes, add this to every scene where medals could be unlocked.
This clip has example code for how to unlock a medal using the widget below.
Copy and paste the appropriate board for your use case.
This clip has example code for how to post a high score.
This clip has example code for how to save and load with the above component
Copy and paste the appropriate component for your use case.

DOMComponentInstance.name: ngioConnector
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="appId"> <Inspectable name="App ID" variable="appId" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="61512:1uYiEl7d" type="String"/> </property> <property id="encryptionKey"> <Inspectable name="Encryption Key" variable="encryptionKey" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="1FjdwbrBGZ4oBZuMPhXqBQ==" type="String"/> </property> <property id="appVersion"> <Inspectable name="App version" variable="appVersion" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property> <property id="debug"> <Inspectable name="Debug Mode" variable="debug" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property> <property id="showNetworkiMessages"> <Inspectable name="Show Network Messages" variable="showNetworkiMessages" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: ngioMedalPopup
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="show_even_if_unlocked"> <Inspectable name="Show Even if Unlocked" variable="show_even_if_unlocked" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: ngioScoreBoard
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="board_id"> <Inspectable name="ScoreBoard ID" variable="board_id" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="0" type="Number"/> </property> <property id="period"> <Inspectable name="Period" variable="period" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Today" enumeration="Today,Week,Month,Year,All" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show"> <Inspectable name="Show" variable="show" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Everybody" enumeration="My Best,Friends,Everybody" type="List"/> </property> <property id="tag"> <Inspectable name="Tag (optional)" variable="tag" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: ngioScoreBoard
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="board_id"> <Inspectable name="ScoreBoard ID" variable="board_id" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="0" type="Number"/> </property> <property id="period"> <Inspectable name="Period" variable="period" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Today" enumeration="Today,Week,Month,Year,All" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show"> <Inspectable name="Show" variable="show" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Everybody" enumeration="My Best,Friends,Everybody" type="List"/> </property> <property id="tag"> <Inspectable name="Tag (optional)" variable="tag" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: ngioScoreBoard
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="board_id"> <Inspectable name="ScoreBoard ID" variable="board_id" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="0" type="Number"/> </property> <property id="period"> <Inspectable name="Period" variable="period" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Today" enumeration="Today,Week,Month,Year,All" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show"> <Inspectable name="Show" variable="show" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Everybody" enumeration="My Best,Friends,Everybody" type="List"/> </property> <property id="tag"> <Inspectable name="Tag (optional)" variable="tag" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="" type="String"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: saveSlotManager
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="action"> <Inspectable name="Action" variable="action" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Load Data" enumeration="Load Data,Save Data" type="List"/> </property> <property id="sort_by"> <Inspectable name="Sort By" variable="sort_by" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Slot ID" enumeration="Last Updated,Slot ID" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show_slot_numbers"> <Inspectable name="Show Slot Numbers" variable="show_slot_numbers" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="true" type="Boolean"/> </property> <property id="use_raw"> <Inspectable name="Use Raw Data" variable="use_raw" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>

DOMComponentInstance.name: saveSlotManager
DOMComponentInstance.parametersAsXML: <property id="action"> <Inspectable name="Action" variable="action" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Load Data" enumeration="Load Data,Save Data" type="List"/> </property> <property id="sort_by"> <Inspectable name="Sort By" variable="sort_by" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Slot ID" enumeration="Last Updated,Slot ID" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show_slot_numbers"> <Inspectable name="Show Slot Numbers" variable="show_slot_numbers" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="true" type="Boolean"/> </property> <property id="use_raw"> <Inspectable name="Use Raw Data" variable="use_raw" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>
